Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Cybersecurity.asp

# Cybersecurity Route to SBDC

## Reusable BOSS response pattern
For cyber risk, cyber planning, phishing, ransomware, mobile security, CMMC-related learning, or written information security program needs, route to SBDC Cybersecurity resources and specialist support. For active breaches, recommend qualified incident-response help.

## Handoff fields to capture
- Stage
- Business idea/current business
- Location ZIP/county
- Primary decision
- What has been done
- Revenue/customer evidence
- Documents available
- Special eligibility or language preference
- Recommended resource and why
